data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Adobe utilizes a microservices architecture to promote modularity and scalability across its wide range of software solutions.
data.technical_spec: Defined APIs, containerized deployments, and distributed systems.

data.title: Cloud-Native Infrastructure
data.description: Leveraging the cloud to enhance performance and availability for users globally.
data.technical_spec: AWS and Azure integrations, serverless functions.

data.title: Content Delivery Networks (CDN)
data.description: To ensure fast content delivery worldwide, CDNs are employed.
data.technical_spec: Use of Akamai and other CDN services.

data.title: Scalable Storage Solutions
data.description: Adobe uses distributed storage solutions for its creative cloud and other applications.
data.technical_spec: Object storage, data lakes and NoSQL databases.

data.title: Continuous Integration/Deployment
data.description: Supports agile development practices with CI/CD pipelines.
